a_etablir.faille: Absence of direct, dated evidence linking Camille Lefèvre and/or Cassiopée to the actual exploitation of Quiz Mania: no certified screenshot of the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu designating Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer, no Kbis extract (official corporate registration certificate) of Cassiopée showing a corporate purpose covering this digital activity, no Carto Royale 2/[…] Play developer account statement registered in the name of Cassiopée or Julien Mercier.
a_etablir.acte_referme: Supplemental bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) certifying the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu on the […] (Carto Royale 2/[…] Play) identifying Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer, accompanied by an updated Kbis extract (official corporate registration certificate) of Cassiopée and a certified screenshot of the public developer profile.
a_etablir.piece_attendue: Bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) certifying the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu on Carto Royale 2/[…] Play (publisher/developer name = Cassiopée or Julien Mercier)

a_etablir.faille: Absence of direct, dated evidence linking Camille Lefèvre and/or Cassiopée to the actual exploitation of Quiz Mania: no certified screenshot of the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu designating Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer, no Kbis extract (official corporate registration certificate) of Cassiopée showing a corporate purpose covering this digital activity, no Carto Royale 2/[…] Play developer account statement registered in the name of Cassiopée or Julien Mercier.
a_etablir.acte_referme: Supplemental bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) certifying the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu on the […] (Carto Royale 2/[…] Play) identifying Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer, accompanied by an updated Kbis extract (official corporate registration certificate) of Cassiopée and a certified screenshot of the public developer profile.
a_etablir.piece_attendue: Updated Kbis extract of Cassiopée covering the activity of mobile application publishing

a_etablir.faille: Absence of direct, dated evidence linking Camille Lefèvre and/or Cassiopée to the actual exploitation of Quiz Mania: no certified screenshot of the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu designating Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer, no Kbis extract (official corporate registration certificate) of Cassiopée showing a corporate purpose covering this digital activity, no Carto Royale 2/[…] Play developer account statement registered in the name of Cassiopée or Julien Mercier.
a_etablir.acte_referme: Supplemental bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) certifying the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu on the […] (Carto Royale 2/[…] Play) identifying Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer, accompanied by an updated Kbis extract (official corporate registration certificate) of Cassiopée and a certified screenshot of the public developer profile.
a_etablir.piece_attendue: Certified screenshots of the public developer profile of Cassiopée/Julien Mercier on the […] digital platforms

a_etablir.faille: Absence of direct, dated evidence linking Camille Lefèvre and/or Cassiopée to the actual exploitation of Quiz Mania: no certified screenshot of the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu designating Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer, no Kbis extract (official corporate registration certificate) of Cassiopée showing a corporate purpose covering this digital activity, no Carto Royale 2/[…] Play developer account statement registered in the name of Cassiopée or Julien Mercier.
a_etablir.acte_referme: Supplemental bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) certifying the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu on the […] (Carto Royale 2/[…] Play) identifying Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer, accompanied by an updated Kbis extract (official corporate registration certificate) of Cassiopée and a certified screenshot of the public developer profile.
a_etablir.piece_attendue: Any email or public communication by Cassiopée/Julien Mercier announcing or promoting Tohu-Bohu (e.g., Twitter account, press release)

block.label: Admissibility (statute of limitations, standing to sue)

a_etablir.faille: Cassiopée may argue that each act of exploitation of Tohu-Bohu by Julien Mercier constitutes an independent and continuing tortious act, thereby resetting the accrual date of the statute of limitations with respect to that specific exploitation. Furthermore, should Cassiopée assert standing as an original author (rather than as an assignee), the […] question of ownership of the rights in Bastille remains to be adjudicated, which […] could affect the admissibility of its claims.
a_etablir.acte_referme: Bailiff's report (constat d'huissier) bearing a certified date establishing the […] initial public posting of Tohu-Bohu and the date on which Cassiopée acquired knowledge thereof, […] in support of the showing that Cassiopée was aware of the exploitation of Bastille as early as 2018–2019 (through Exhibits 7, 6 Bis, and 12).
a_etablir.piece_attendue: Bailiff's report (constat d'huissier) establishing the date of […] initial public posting of Quiz Mania and its visibility to any competitor in the industry.

block.label: Admissibility (statute of limitations, standing to sue)

a_etablir.faille: Cassiopée may argue that each act of exploitation of Tohu-Bohu by Julien Mercier constitutes an independent and continuing tortious act, thereby resetting the accrual date of the statute of limitations with respect to that specific exploitation. Furthermore, should Cassiopée assert standing as an original author (rather than as an assignee), the […] question of ownership of the rights in Bastille remains to be adjudicated, which […] could affect the admissibility of its claims.
a_etablir.acte_referme: Bailiff's report (constat d'huissier) bearing a certified date establishing the […] initial public posting of Tohu-Bohu and the date on which Cassiopée acquired knowledge thereof, […] in support of the showing that Cassiopée was aware of the exploitation of Bastille as early as 2018–2019 (through Exhibits 7, 6 Bis, and 12).
a_etablir.piece_attendue: Kbis extract and exploitation history of Méridian Studios demonstrating the priority and continuity of the exploitation of Bastille since 2018
